The purpose of the Tampa Bay Intergroup is to make known the services of the fel-
lowship of S.L.A.A. in the Tampa Bay Area (and throughout the West Central Region
of Florida). The Tampa Bay Intergroup cannot, and does not, speak for all of S.L.A.A.
Our services include regular weekly group meetings at various locations in nine cities,
a telephone help-line, a regular monthly newsletter, and various annual gatherings
